description: Comprehensive 3-panel figure: pLDDT profile, active site geometry comparison, and evidence convergence
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(16, 5.5))

# Panel 1: pLDDT profile across the full Drosophila Echs1 sequence
ax1 = axes[0]

# Re-parse pLDDT data
import requests
pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q7JR58-F1-model_v6.pdb"
pdb_resp = requests.get(pdb_url)
pdb_text = pdb_resp.text

plddt_data = {}
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        res_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        plddt_data[res_num] = bfactor

positions = sorted(plddt_data.keys())
plddts = [plddt_data[p] for p in positions]

# Color by confidence
colors = []
for p in plddts:
    if p > 90: colors.append('#0053d6')      # very high
    elif p > 70: colors.append('#65cbf3')     # confident  
    elif p > 50: colors.append('#ffdb13')     # low
    else: colors.append('#ff7d45')            # very low

ax1.bar(positions, plddts, color=colors, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')

# Highlight catalytic residues
for rpos, label in [(149, 'E149\n(cat.)'), (169, 'E169\n(cat.)')]:
    ax1.axvline(x=rpos, color='red', linewidth=1.5, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
    ax1.annotate(label, xy=(rpos, plddt_data[rpos]), 
                xytext=(rpos+8, plddt_data[rpos]-8),
                fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='red',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1))

# Highlight active site motif
ax1.axvspan(146, 160, alpha=0.15, color='green', label='Active site motif')

ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Position', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT Score', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_title('AlphaFold Confidence (Q7JR58)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_ylim(0, 105)
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5)
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5)
ax1.legend(fontsize=8, loc='lower right')

# Panel 2: Active site distance comparison across species
ax2 = axes[1]
species = ['Rat ECH\n(PDB 1DUB)', 'Human ECHS1\n(AlphaFold)', 'Drosophila Echs1\n(AlphaFold)']
cd_cd_dists = [5.22, 5.37, 5.48]
bar_colors = ['#4a90d9', '#4a90d9', '#e8524a']

bars = ax2.bar(species, cd_cd_dists, color=bar_colors, edgecolor='#333333', linewidth=0.8, width=0.6)
for bar, val in zip(bars, cd_cd_dists):
    ax2.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, val + 0.05, f'{val:.2f} Å', 
             ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

ax2.set_ylabel('Glu-Glu CD-CD Distance (Å)', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_title('Catalytic Glutamate Geometry', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_ylim(0, 7)
ax2.axhspan(4.5, 6.0, alpha=0.1, color='green', label='Expected range')
ax2.legend(fontsize=8)

# Panel 3: Evidence convergence summary
ax3 = axes[2]
evidence_categories = [
    'Sequence\nIdentity',
    'Catalytic\nResidues',
    'Active Site\nMotif',
    '3D Geometry\n(AlphaFold)',
    'Domain\nArchitecture',
    'Cross-species\nRescue',
    'Metabolic\nPhenotype',
    'PANTHER\nClassification'
]
scores = [3, 5, 5, 5, 5, 4.5, 4, 5]

# Create radar-like bar chart
y_pos = np.arange(len(evidence_categories))
bar_colors_3 = ['#2d8a4e' if s >= 4.5 else '#6db56d' if s >= 3.5 else '#a8d4a8' for s in scores]

bars3 = ax3.barh(y_pos, scores, color=bar_colors_3, edgecolor='#333333', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax3.set_yticklabels(evidence_categories, fontsize=8)
ax3.set_xlabel('Support Score (1-5)', fontsize=10)
ax3.set_title('Evidence Convergence\nfor GO:0004300', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax3.set_xlim(0, 5.8)

for bar, val in zip(bars3, scores):
    ax3.text(val + 0.08, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, f'{val}', 
             va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('comprehensive_evidence.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: comprehensive_evidence.png")
